Emergency Service

Need Immediate Assistance?

For life-threatening emergencies, always call 911. For urgent fire safety issues, call our 24/7 emergency line.

FDU
Fire DetectionUnlimited, Inc.

Making fire alarm simple for Bay Area businesses since 2001. Veteran-owned, NICET Level IV certified.

Services

  • Design & Installation
  • 24/7 Monitoring
  • Inspections & Maintenance
  • Emergency Repairs
  • System Upgrades
